# Cabinet Order to Enforce APPI

Jurisdiction: Japan
Region: JP
Citation: Cabinet Order to Enforce the Act on the Protection of Personal Information
Authority: Personal Information Protection Commission / Japanese Law Translation
Source URL: https://www.japaneselawtranslation.go.jp/en/laws/view/4242/en
Topics: sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, accountability
Keywords: APPI Cabinet Order, Japan PPC, personal information

## Summary
Cabinet order implementing APPI concepts and operational thresholds.

## Key compliance obligations
- Use cabinet-order definitions with APPI compliance.
- Check prescribed details for data subject rights and disclosures.
- Apply APPI implementation thresholds.
